problem id: 431b5993
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) AND SHL(3)

examples:
  10111010 -> 10000000
  00011010 -> 10000000
  01110100 -> 00000000
  00110101 -> 00001000
  10101111 -> 01101000
  00101111 -> 01001000
  01101001 -> 01001000
  11000111 -> 00110000

query: 11011011
predicted answer: 11010000
